data.body: Fixes #1 (reconciler workflows: full history + merge) and #3 (fsck ORPHAN exemption) LANDED on main via Gerrit change 318 (merged), commit 5a7548a. LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 both green. Deferred RC2b + .retired compaction + store remediation remain tracked in epic ace2-f784-4b19-4f22.
